title: cert_read_trusted: clamps out_len > buffer instead of ProtocolError (inconsistent with nvm_read)
description: cert.rs: after calling wh_Client_CertReadTrusted, uses .min(meta.len) to clamp a server-reported out_len > buffer size, silently hiding the anomaly. nvm_read, ecc ops, rsa ops all return ProtocolError on the same condition. Fix: check out_len as usize > buf.len() → ProtocolError, then buf.truncate(out_len as usize). No actual memory safety risk (C API respects the passed-in cap), but the inconsistency makes the crate harder to audit.
